title: Loops vs Zoho Campaigns (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Loops vs Zoho Campaigns: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Loops vs Zoho Campaigns: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Loops and Zoho Campaigns comes down to your specific use case. Loops is built for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails, while Zoho Campaigns targets Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses

faq.q: Is Loops better than Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Loops wins for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails, while Zoho Campaigns is stronger for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Loops or Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Zoho Campaigns to Loops?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
